description: Agent app: upload an image, extract semantic elements as layers, and animate them from natural-language prompts. M1 MVP: Vite+Vue3 frontend, FastAPI backend, Claude VLM + Replicate SAM2 + GSAP.

userStories.title: Scaffold FastAPI backend with health check
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a FastAPI backend skeleton with health check so subsequent endpoints can be added.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/ contains FastAPI app and pyproject.toml (uv or poetry)
/health returns {"status": "ok"}
uvicorn app.main:app --reload starts successfully
CORS middleware configured to allow http://localhost:5173
backend/README.md documents how to run
Typecheck (ruff + mypy) passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Image upload endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload an image so the system can process it.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/upload accepts multipart/form-data with field 'file'
Accepts PNG/JPG/WebP up to 10MB; other formats return 400
Stores image to backend/storage/images/{uuid}.{ext}
Returns {"image_id": uuid, "width": int, "height": int}
pytest cases cover success, oversized, and invalid format
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: VLM element perception endpoint
userStories.description: As the system, I need to call Claude VLM to identify semantic elements in the uploaded image.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/perception accepts {"image_id": "..."}
Uses Anthropic SDK with model claude-opus-4-7 or claude-sonnet-4-6
Uses tool_use to force structured JSON: [{id, label, bbox: [x,y,w,h], z_order}]
Caches result to backend/storage/perception/{image_id}.json; repeat calls read cache
Reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from environment
Tests pass with mocked Anthropic responses
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: SAM2 segmentation endpoint
userStories.description: As the system, I need to segment each identified element into a transparent PNG layer using Replicate SAM2.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/segment accepts {"image_id": "...", "elements": [...]}
Calls Replicate SAM2 (meta/sam-2) for each element bbox to generate mask
Applies mask to cut transparent PNG; saves to backend/storage/layers/{image_id}/{element_id}.png
Returns layer URL per element
Reads REPLICATE_API_TOKEN from environment
Tests pass with mocked Replicate client
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Background inpainting endpoint
userStories.description: As the system, I need to inpaint the holes left after extracting elements so the background layer is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/inpaint accepts {"image_id": "...", "masks": [...]}
Uses Replicate inpainting model to fill the combined mask region
Saves result to backend/storage/layers/{image_id}/background.png
Returns background URL
Tests pass with mocked Replicate client
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Animation DSL planner endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want my natural-language description to be converted into a per-element animation plan.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/plan-animation accepts {"image_id": "...", "elements": [...], "prompt": "..."}
Calls Claude with element list; returns GSAP-compatible DSL [{element_id, timeline, easing, loop, duration_ms}]
DSL schema defined in backend/app/schemas/animation.py using Pydantic
Supports 5 primitives: translate, rotate, scale, opacity, path-follow
Validates that every element_id exists in the input elements list
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Scaffold Vite + Vue3 frontend
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Vite + Vue3 frontend skeleton with routing and basic layout.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/ uses Vite + Vue3 + TypeScript + Tailwind
Vue Router configured with / (home) and /editor/:imageId
API client wrapper with base URL http://localhost:8000
npm run dev starts on port 5173
Typecheck (vue-tsc) passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Image upload page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a drag-and-drop upload page so I can start processing my image.
acceptanceCriteria: Home page has drag-and-drop upload area with size/format hint
On upload, calls /api/upload then navigates to /editor/:imageId on success
Shows upload progress
Shows error messages for format/size/network failures
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Element list panel and pipeline orchestration
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what elements the AI identified so I can trust or correct them.
acceptanceCriteria: Editor left panel lists all elements with label + thumbnail
On page load, sequentially triggers /api/perception -> /api/segment -> /api/inpaint so background.png exists for US-010
Shows skeleton loading with per-step progress indicator
Clicking an element highlights its outline on the canvas
Each of the three API failures handled separately with retry
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Layered canvas renderer
userStories.description: As a user, I want the image redrawn as stacked layers so each element can be animated independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Editor center shows a canvas matching original image dimensions
Background layer and each element layer stacked by z_order
Visually matches original image (no boundary artifacts)
Component encapsulated in frontend/src/components/LayeredCanvas.vue
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: DSL-to-GSAP animator library
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a tested animator library that turns DSL into GSAP timelines, so the UI story can focus on wiring.
acceptanceCriteria: GSAP installed as a dependency
frontend/src/lib/animator.ts exports buildTimeline(dsl, layerRefs) returning a gsap.core.Timeline
Implements 5 primitives: translate, rotate, scale, opacity, path-follow
Each primitive supports easing and loop fields
Vitest unit tests for each primitive assert duration, target values, and repeat on the generated timeline
Throws identifiable errors for unknown primitives or missing element_ids
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Animation prompt UI and playback controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to type what I want the elements to do and see them animate.
acceptanceCriteria: Right panel has a textarea and 'Make it Lively' button
Clicking button calls /api/plan-animation and applies the DSL via US-011a's buildTimeline on LayeredCanvas
Play, pause, and reset buttons work with correct disabled state per playback state
API failure shows an error and does not corrupt existing canvas state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: GIF export
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export the animation as a GIF so I can share it.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Export GIF' button in the editor
Uses gif.js or gifenc to record canvas frames (>=2s, 15fps)
Automatically downloads make-it-lively.gif
Shows progress during recording
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Backend pipeline integration test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a pytest that runs the full backend pipeline with mocked external calls, plus a manual e2e checklist for live runs.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/smoke.md documents manual verification steps with a fixed reference image and prompt (used with real API keys)
Backend has fixtures or snapshots for perception/segment/plan-animation on the reference image
A pytest case runs upload -> perception -> segment -> inpaint -> plan-animation with mocked or VCR-recorded external calls
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
